name: Taco Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the taco sauce and soup.
2. Puree the vegetables in a blender instead of chopping them.
3. Form meatballs and place in two 2-1/2 quart dishes.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
5. Heat the taco sauce and soup on the stove.
6. Pour the heated sauce and soup over the meatballs.
7. Return to oven and bake an additional 30 minutes.
